content:
I Need You - LeAnn Rimes

[Intro]
| [ch]Em9[/ch] | % | [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] | % | [ch]Em9[/ch] | % | [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] | [ch]D7[/ch] |
| [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] |

[tab]            [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Da-da-da da-da.[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
I don't need a lot of things I can get by with nothing.[/tab]
[tab]                                          [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
But all the blessings life can bring I've always needed something.[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]G[/ch]
But I've got all I want when it comes to loving you.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
You're my only reason, you're my only truth.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
I need you like water, like breath, like rain.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I need you like mercy from heaven's gate.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
There's a freedom in your arms that carries me through, I need you.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
(Da-da-da da-da, ooh.)[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]                                 [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
You're the hope that moves me to courage again, oh yeah.[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
You're the love that rescues me when the cold winters rage.[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
And it's so amazing 'cause that's just how you are.[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
And I can't turn back now 'cause you've brought me too far.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
I need you like water, like breath, like rain.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I need you like mercy from heaven's gate.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
There's a freedom in your arms that carries me through, I need you.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Oh yes I do.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
I need you like water, like breath, like rain.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I need you like mercy from heaven's gate.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
There's a freedom in your arms that carries me through, I need you.[/tab]
